## Summary

- Describe the problem this PR solves.
- Describe the implementation at a high level.

## Changes

- List the main code or dependency changes.
- Call out any config, workflow, or packaging updates.

## Validation

- Document the commands you ran locally.
- Include relevant CI expectations or links.

## Risks

- Note compatibility concerns, migrations, or follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests updated or not needed
- [ ] CI expectations verified
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior changed
